entry.title: Chapter 3 — System Architecture
entry.content:
How components fit together

Model, loop, tools, memory, planning, and evaluation are not separate “modules” in practice—they interact continuously.

This chapter will provide a clear reference architecture and show how to wire it together locally.

entry.title: Chapter 5 — The Agent Loop
entry.content:
How iteration creates intelligence over time

This chapter focuses on the “loop” that turns single-shot model outputs into multi-step behaviors: think, act, observe, reflect.

Key idea

Agents get better through repeated cycles, guided by constraints and evaluation—not just by larger prompts.
